design_philosophy.core_loop: Select team and formation, execute real-time soccer matches through passing, shooting, and defensive positioning with realistic player AI and league progression
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Match outcome determined by player skill execution, team tactics, and AI opponent adaptation across realistic professional soccer leagues
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Manage and play as real professional soccer teams and players, experiencing authentic football competition with strategic depth
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Prioritizes simulation authenticity and realism over arcade accessibility; emphasizes realistic passing controls, player-specific AI behavior, and true-to-life match physics rather than arcade scoring explosions

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player controls team selection, formation, and tactical play to influence match outcomes; AI opponent adapts to player strategies

progression.upgrade_system: Team customization, player transfers, and league progression through seasonal play
progression.unlock_mechanism: Access to multiple real professional leagues and comprehensive roster of over 3,000 real players with authentic rankings and positions
replayability_hooks: Multiple camera angles for varied viewing experiences
Transfer and team customization tools for squad management
Seasonal league play allowing progressive advancement
Large roster of real teams and players encouraging different team selection

world_building_techniques: Real professional soccer leagues and teams establish authentic context
Real player names and positions create player recognition and investment
Play-by-play commentary reinforces match atmosphere and realism
Multiple stadium environments and crowd audio enhance world immersion

faction_indicators: Team selection reflects player preference and club allegiance
League participation demonstrates competitive engagement level
Custom team configurations show personalization of play style
environmental_storytelling: Real stadium aesthetics and crowd reactions create authentic match atmosphere
Player rosters reflect real professional soccer hierarchies and skill levels
League structures and team rankings establish competitive context and stakes

sources_used: wikipedia: FIFA Soccer 96 development notes, features, and critical reception
